summary.summary: Imported via zip fallback, file count: 1060

core_modules.description: Core physical quantity type with units; foundational across Astropy subpackages and suitable as a stable MCP-facing abstraction.
Unit system core implementation and conversion logic; central for interoperability and safe numerical transformations.
High-level coordinate container and transformation API; key user entry point for coordinate workflows.
Time scale/format conversion core; widely used dependency in coordinates, timeseries, and ephemeris calculations.
Primary structured tabular data model; central integration point with io.registry and serialization backends.
Unified I/O dispatch mechanism used by table/fits/ascii/votable and others; best target for low-intrusion format capability exposure.
High-level FITS file access helpers; practical MCP tool surface for astronomy file workflows.
World Coordinate System transformations between pixel and world coordinates; common core for image/cube astronomy pipelines.
Cosmology model implementations frequently consumed in scientific workflows; useful optional MCP domain tools.
Robust statistics utilities commonly used in preprocessing and quality-control operations.

cli_commands.name: fitscheck
cli_commands.description: Validate FITS files and checksums from command line.

cli_commands.name: fitsdiff
cli_commands.description: Compare FITS files and report header/data differences.

cli_commands.name: fitsheader
cli_commands.description: Print FITS header content from files/HDUs.

cli_commands.name: fitsinfo
cli_commands.description: Summarize FITS HDU structure and metadata.

cli_commands.name: showtable
cli_commands.description: Display tabular file contents through astropy table readers.

cli_commands.name: fits2bitmap
cli_commands.description: Convert FITS images to bitmap formats for visualization.
